text: Stepping from the dim sterility of the corridor into the colored, softly-glowing space, I feel a piquant shift—uncertainty tinged with excitement. The words projected in front of me speak of confusion and comfort in ambiguity, and I feel seen. Here, where research and poetry seem to intertwine, my thoughts loosen from their usual boundaries. I am suspended in a liminal state—half observer, half participant—both aware of my wandering mind and oddly at home amid the unknown.
